name: Herb Ripper XL 4 Piece Grinder
summary: The Herb Ripper XL 4-Piece is built for customers who need extra capacity, unbeatable strength, and consistently reliable performance.
description: The Herb Ripper XL 4-Piece is built for customers who need extra capacity, unbeatable strength, and consistently reliable performance. Featuring a spacious 2.5" diameter and upgraded engineering throughout, this heavy-duty stainless steel grinder handles large quantities with ease while delivering smooth, hybrid-style grinds without clogs or jams. Manufactured in the USA from 100% medical-grade stainless steel, it’s designed to offer a lifetime of dependable use. If your customers are still using aluminium or plastic grinders, this is the ideal upgrade. A small upgrade that makes every session more even.
